title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines six skills for optimizing Claude projects: web scraping, knowledge base ingestion, system iteration, board-of-advisors prompting, user testing, and compound engineering. The framework is demonstrated through building a fitness trainer project and emphasizes creating faster workflows and higher quality outputs.
